allow: Bash(sed -i '/^\\*\\*Note:\\*\\* If you need to restart/d' src/content/docs/exercises/exercise-1.mdx src/content/docs/exercises/exercise-3.mdx src/content/docs/exercises/exercise-4.mdx src/content/docs/exercises/exercise-5.mdx src/content/docs/exercises/exercise-6.mdx)

Bash(perl -i -0pe 's/```asm\\n\(    \\.text\\nmain:\\n    addi s0\)/```asm\\n# Exercise 03\\n# if \(i != j\) f = g + h;\\n# f = f - i;\\n\\n$1/' src/content/docs/exercises/exercise-3.mdx)

Bash(perl -i -pe 's/^Consolidate the implementation of an if-else statement in RISC-V assembly using conditional and unconditional branch instructions\\./Consolidate conditional and unconditional branching in RISC-V assembly by implementing an if-else statement using bne and j./' src/content/docs/exercises/exercise-4.mdx)
